rationale: The creation of DefaultUserName and DefaultPassword registry keys (A0, EV-001, EV-002, EV-003) under HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon indicates an attempt to enable autologon, which is a common persistence mechanism. While the DefaultPassword key was subsequently deleted (EV-004), the initial creation of both keys is highly suspicious and could have allowed for unauthorized access if not immediately remediated or if the deletion was not effective.
